concept: Players find hidden words within a letter grid by swiping across adjacent letters in any direction, matching words from a provided list. Correct swipes highlight the word and remove it, with hints available for assistance. Progression occurs by completing levels, earning coins for hints, and unlocking new "Explorer" themes. The UI displays the grid and word list, with swipe controls and buttons for hints, alongside a map-like progression screen.
name: Word Search Explorer®
